title: Delivery worker (tokio task, retry, circuit breaker)
description: Implement the in-process delivery worker as a tokio task that continuously polls delivery_queue and delivers outbound ActivityPub activities via HTTP POST with HTTP signatures. Retry schedule: 1m, 5m, 30m, 2h, 8h, 24h (max 6 attempts, then dead_at). 410 Gone → dead immediately. 4xx (not 410) → dead after 1 retry. Per-domain circuit breaker: 10 consecutive failures → 1hr pause.
design: Poll interval: configurable, default 5s. Batch size: configurable, default 100. Parallel delivery: tokio::spawn per delivery up to delivery_concurrency. HTTP signature: sign (request-target), host, date, digest. Digest: SHA-256 of body, base64. keyId: {actor_uri}#main-key. Circuit breaker: in-memory HashMap<domain, (fail_count, backoff_until)>. Update next_attempt_at using retry schedule on failure.
acceptance_criteria: Activity delivered to mastodon.social inbox with correct HTTP-Signature header; failed delivery retries on schedule; 410 Gone marks row dead immediately; circuit breaker prevents hammering dead domains; smallhold queue inspect shows pending deliveries
